mapper.sql: id, record_id, class_stat_id, category_stat_id, daily_check_detail_id, class_id, class_name, category_id, category_name, check_round, deduction_item_id, deduction_item_code, deduction_item_name, deduct_mode, base_score, per_person_score, min_score, max_score_limit, actual_score, person_count, student_ids, student_names, link_type, link_id, link_code, link_name, photo_urls, photo_count, remark, checker_id, checker_name, check_time, appeal_status, appeal_id, appeal_result_remark, is_revised, original_score, revised_score, revision_time, revision_reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM check_record_deductions_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY class_id, check_round, category_id, id
SELECT FROM check_record_deductions_new WHERE class_stat_id = #{classStatId} ORDER BY check_round, category_id, id
SELECT FROM check_record_deductions_new WHERE category_stat_id = #{categoryStatId} ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM check_record_deductions_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY check_round, category_id, id
SELECT FROM check_record_deductions_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND FIND_IN_SET(#{studentId}, student_ids) ORDER BY check_round, category_id, id
SELECT FROM check_record_deductions_new WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND appeal_status = 1 ORDER BY class_id, id
mapper.update: UPDATE check_record_deductions_new SET appeal_status = #{appealStatus}, appeal_id = #{appealId}, appeal_result_remark = #{appealResultRemark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{deductionId}

UPDATE check_record_deductions_new SET is_revised = 1, original_score = actual_score, revised_score = #{revisedScore}, actual_score = #{revisedScore}, revision_time = NOW(), revision_reason = #{revisionReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO check_record_deductions_new ( id, record_id, class_stat_id, category_stat_id, daily_check_detail_id, class_id, class_name, category_id, category_name, check_round, deduction_item_id, deduction_item_code, deduction_item_name, deduct_mode, base_score, per_person_score, min_score, max_score_limit, actual_score, person_count, student_ids, student_names, link_type, link_id, link_code, link_name, photo_urls, photo_count, remark, checker_id, checker_name, check_time, appeal_status, appeal_id, appeal_result_remark, is_revised, original_score, revised_score, revision_time, revision_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.recordId}, #{item.classStatId}, #{item.categoryStatId}, #{item.dailyCheckDetailId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.className}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.checkRound}, #{item.deductionItemId}, #{item.deductionItemCode}, #{item.deductionItemName}, #{item.deductMode}, #{item.baseScore}, #{item.perPersonScore}, #{item.minScore}, #{item.maxScoreLimit}, #{item.actualScore}, #{item.personCount}, #{item.studentIds}, #{item.studentNames}, #{item.linkType}, #{item.linkId}, #{item.linkCode}, #{item.linkName}, #{item.photoUrls}, #{item.photoCount}, #{item.remark}, #{item.checkerId}, #{item.checkerName}, #{item.checkTime}, #{item.appealStatus}, #{item.appealId}, #{item.appealResultRemark}, #{item.isRevised}, #{item.originalScore}, #{item.revisedScore}, #{item.revisionTime}, #{item.revisionReason}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE check_record_deductions_new SET actual_score = #{actualScore}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{deductionId}
